zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Appleyard於大約1352年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Bartholomew Appleyard19歲，母親Emma de Bumpsteade16歲。她與John de Varde結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國越可爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Appleyard于大约1352年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Bartholomew Appleyard19岁，母亲Emma de Bumpsteade16岁。她与John de Varde结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国越可爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Appleyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic name for someone who lived by an apple orchard, Middle English appleyard, or a habitational name from Appleyard in Yorkshire with the same etymology. There are several places called with this term, of which the most significant as a source of surnames is in Yorkshire. It is also an Americanized form of Applegarth , which in Scandinavian-speaking areas replaced the native Appleton .

variants.name: Applegarth
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: topographic name from northern Middle English applegarth ‘apple orchard’ (Old Norse apaldr ‘apple tree’ + garthr ‘enclosure’), or a habitational name from a place so named, of which there are examples in Cumbria and North and East Yorkshire, as well as in the county of Dumfries.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Appleyard was born about 1352, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew Appleyard, was 19 and her mother, Emma de Bumpsteade, was 16. She married John de Varde. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Appleyard est née environ 1352, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew Appleyard, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Emma de Bumpsteade, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John de Varde. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Appleyard um 1352 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew Appleyard 19 und ihre Mutter Emma de Bumpsteade 16. Sie hat John de Varde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Appleyard è nata il circa 1352 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Bartholomew Appleyard, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Emma de Bumpsteade, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John de Varde. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Appleyardが約1352年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Appleyardは19歳，母Emma de Bumpsteadeは16歳であった。John de Vardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Appleyard(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Appleyard(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Bumpsteade(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 John de Varde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 요르크실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Appleyard nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartholomew Appleyard, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Bumpsteade, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Varde. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Appleyard родилась около 1352 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Appleyard было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Bumpsteade, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Varde. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Appleyard nació aproximadamente 1352, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Bartholomew Appleyard, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Emma de Bumpsteade, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John de Varde. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1430, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
